title: Formula won't work for mobile user
excerpt: In our team board, we use a formula to calculate age, and for one of our users this formula won’t return a value on her mobile device. It works fine on her computer, on other team members phones and computers. Her phone …

posts.author: DitpAdmin (Laura)
posts.cookedHtml:
In our team board, we use a formula to calculate age, and for one of our users this formula won’t return a value on her mobile device. It works fine on her computer, on other team members phones and computers. Her phone is an Android. Any suggestions?

Thanks!

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DitpAdmin

The formula column should be viewable in the mobile app - both for iOS and Android.
Could you please ask the user to check that they are using the most updated version of the mobile app? We release new updates every 2 weeks!

If the issue persists, our support team would love to take a closer look into this.
Could you please ask the user to reach out via support@monday.com? It would be really helpful if they could also include a screenshot of the issue as it appears on mobile, and how the same column appears within the browser / desktop version of the app.

Best,

Dani
